narrative: For settlement report STL-2026-06-0042 covering 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-30, merchant ****7788 recorded USD 100,000.00 in gross card sales across Visa (60.0%), Mastercard (30.0%), and Amex (10.0%). One line (Pending interchange reclassification) carried no amount and is excluded from the tie-out. Informational summary only; not a reconciliation of your records and not fee or financial advice.
